summary: All production readiness phase gates (6, 7, 8) passed successfully with an exit code of 0. The builder has created a comprehensive set of files for observability, data governance, and documentation, meeting all specified acceptance criteria. A minor issue was noted where security tests were skipped due to the test environment lacking the 'pytest' dependency.
minors: Security tests for PII redaction and tenant isolation were skipped because 'pytest' was not available in the execution environment. While the gate script passed, the lack of test execution for these critical components represents a quality risk.
next_actions_for_builder: Ensure the CI/test environment has 'pytest' installed so that the Phase 7 security tests are executed.
Consider modifying the Phase 7 gate to fail if the security tests are skipped.
evidence: Builder Note 5: PII tests are comprehensive but pytest execution was skipped (not installed in test env)
